# Joypad ESP32-S3 Partition Table (4MB f: # TinyUF2 lives in the factory partition at 0x2D0000 (flashed once via combined.bin).
# Our app goes to ota_0 at 0x10000. TinyUF2 copies .uf2 files there.
# We omit the factory partition so ESP-IDF targets ota_0 for the app build.
# The bootloader still finds ota_0 correctly via otadata.
